nasb.text: The merchants among the peoples hiss at you; You have become terrified And you will cease to be forever.’ ” ’ ”

esv.text: The merchants among the peoples hiss at you; you have come to a dreadful end and shall be no more forever.’”

cnv.text: 各族的商人都嗤笑你； 你必遭遇可怕的災禍， 你就永遠不再存在了。’”

ccb.text: 各国商人都嗤笑你， 你那可怕的末日来临了， 你将永远不复存在。’”
